title: feed.rs: URL interpolated into href attribute without escaping
description:
Line 74 builds an tag via format\!(r#"

{url}

"#). If the URL from the feed contains a double-quote character, it breaks the href attribute boundary. Example: http://example.com/?a=1"onmouseover="evil() results in an attribute injection. While the result is passed to sanitize_html, ammonia's behavior on malformed attribute values is not guaranteed to clean injected event handlers in all cases. The URL should be percent-encoded or HTML-entity-escaped before interpolation into the attribute value.
close_reason: All pass 4 fixes applied: media SSRF+size guard, mime/format consistency, proper keyId parsing, fail-closed sig verify, path reconstruction, key owner validation, media cap, blocking stdin fix, conflicts_with
